sg_weights._note: Aronimink: par-70 bentgrass course, historically demanding small greens. APP elevated (1.30) — small greens, tight approach windows. ARG elevated (1.20) — Major rough penalties, false fronts. PUTT moderate (1.05) — bentgrass greens reward good putters. OTT moderate (1.10) — length matters but fairway positioning critical. Generic PGA Championship weights applied — no Aronimink-specific modern data.

course_weight_override._note: Standard weights — no Aronimink modern history; course fit layer has low confidence. Consider reducing courseFit weight to 0.15/0.12 in Phase 1 if coverage < 20%.

course_history_note: PGA Championship rotates venues yearly. Aronimink has NO modern course history (last hosted 1962). event_id=33 history covers different PGA Championship venues (2017-2025). Course fit model should treat all players as NO_HISTORY or LIMITED tier for Aronimink-specific history. Flag: Phase 1 may return 0/N Aronimink-specific course history — this is expected. Do NOT add a fallback entry for event_id=33 (rotating venue).
course_notes: Par-70, ~7200y. Aronimink Golf Club, Newtown Square PA. Last PGA Championship here: 1962. Bentgrass greens, est. stimpmeter 13.5 for major setup. Known for: tight fairways, small and undulating greens, demanding iron play. Heavy rough expected (major setup). No modern SG data for this venue. Major-field composition: invitational (approx 156 players including LIV). Par-70 means 2 par-5s, 12 par-4s, 4 par-3s — iron play at par-3s critical.
winner_archetype: Elite iron player with major experience. Par-70 reduces advantage of long hitters slightly but Aronimink's length (7200y) still demands adequate OTT. Bentgrass putter with major composure. Major history at PGA Championship (venue rotates — general major experience applies).
bbi_pipeline_action: FULL — Major championship. Individual BBI v8.5 rankings active. WARNING: No Aronimink venue history. Course fit layer has low confidence. Consider major-field expansion to top-55 ranked players (Masters improvement suggestion wk10). Phase 1 / THEMIS / OMNIA all run normally.
